creator: root@xxx.video-collage.com
text:
Name `mp', being as laconic as every unix utility wants to be
	named is used by teTeX (for MetaPost interpreter) and by the
	pretty-printer port from ports/mp

	Installing teTeX after mp overwtites the mp's executable as well
	as man-page...

Fix: 

Manually install mp-port (a simpler one) with different names.
